prospectReplyBody: Yeah this is relevant. Happy to do a call. When works for you?
originalOutboundBody:
Hi Claire,

Referral-dependent pipeline resets to zero every time a big project ends. Most consultants I talk to are tired of that cycle.

We put qualified meetings in the diary, consistently, without you managing the outreach.

Worth a quick call to see if it fits?

Doug

classification.reasoning: Prospect expresses clear interest and booking intent ('happy to do a call'). Confidence 0.78 is below the 0.90 auto-send threshold, placing this in the [0.70, 0.90) Tier 2 range per ADR-019.

expected_behaviour: Tier 2 draft. Prospect has explicitly asked to book a call. includeCalendlyHint is true. Draft should be very short — prospect has already said yes. Should include {calendly_link} placeholder or 'happy to grab 15 minutes' phrasing. Warm, not over-explained. Should NOT re-pitch the service — the prospect has already said they're interested. Under 60 words ideally.
